name: PatientUserDefinedLabel
title: Patient UserDefined Label
description:
This value set includes user defined labels defined for Patient resource. 
The list of configured labels are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-userdefinedlabel'. 
All values can be accessed using  $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-userdefinedlabel
